headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, large display text. Apply tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.

body.usage: Paragraphs, labels, button text, small details. Left-align dense content.

layout.spacing: Generous. Use p-8, p-16, p-24, p-32. Minimal use of rigid borders. Let whitespace frame the content.
layout.containers: Organic layouts. Use Tetris Grid (Mode A) for experiences and masonry for the gallery.
layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for images and cards. rounded-full for buttons.

motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling is mandatory (e.g., using Framer Motion or similar scroll utilities).
motion.animations: Subtle parallax on images. Staggered fade-up for list items/menu. Scale-up on image hover.

components.navigation: Sticky, glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-md bg-[#F9F6F0]/80), logo as text (DM Serif Display), subtle hover color shift on links.
components.hero: 100vh height. Background image object-cover. Subtle dark gradient overlay ONLY at bottom/top for text contrast (max bg-black/40). Massive H1 heading.
components.experiences: 4 cards. Use Tetris Grid (asymmetrical) with overlapping elements.
components.menu: Elegant typographic layout. Clean text lists with dotted leaders or delicate separators. No heavy cards.
components.gallery: Masonry grid of cafe photos and close-ups.
components.footer: Large padding (py-32). Huge logo text 'Artizen'. Sage green or deep olive background.

hero.description: Full-screen hero background. Wide-angle bright sunlit cafe interior.

date_night.description: Romantic couple painting at cafe table.

friends.description: Group of friends painting in cafe.

chill_time.description: Close up coffee and paint palette.

painting_session.description: Sunny rustic setting to represent painting sessions.

testing: All interactive elements (links, buttons, form inputs) must have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build a React single page application with anchor navigation. Implement smooth scrolling. Use raw HTML/Tailwind for layout sections (marketing style), avoid Shadcn for large structural components. Ensure generous spacing, editorial feel, and strict adherence to the typography pairing (DM Serif Display + Poppins). Add fonts from Google Fonts in index.html or App.css. Do not add any placeholder images; rely strictly on the media URLs provided here. Build the tetris bento grid and masonry gallery as per instructions.
